message:
chore: Add ephemeral files to gitignore

Add a.out (compiled binary) and .beads/.bv.lock (beads viewer lock)
to gitignore to keep working directory clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -249,3 +249,7 @@ test.sqlite3-wal
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
 tests/benchmarks/regression_reports/
+
+# Ephemeral files
+a.out
+.beads/.bv.lock
